titleStmt.title: SII 9.23: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 23. (A.R. No. 198 of 1910.) ON A PILLAR LYING IN THE TALUK OFFICE COMPOUND AT DHARMAPURI, DHARMAPURI TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 851, Virōdhin, Māgha, navamī, Vaḍḍavāra, Mūlānakshatra and Siddha-yōga, corresponding toDates in thisA.D. 929 February 5, Thursday; f.d.t. 20; f.d.n. ·95. It refers itself to the reign of the Noḻamba-Pallava king Iruḷachōra. Noḻamba-Mahēndra is said to have been the son of Noḻambādhirāja and Jāyabbe, daughter of the Gaṅga king Rāchamalla-Permānaḍi. The record gives the genealogy of the Noḻamba dynasty from Mahēndra down to Iṟuḷachōra. It is incomplete and mentions a certain Māṅgabbe-Kanti and Tagaḍūru (modern Dharmapuri).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
©svasti pallavānva
yāya . vijitacatu
rantamahīmaṁḍaḷaśrī
pallavādhirājara ma
ganavanatasamasta
sāmantamakuṭamaṇi
kiraṇāruṇitaca
raṇasarasīruha
śrīnoḻambhādhirā
jarggaṁ svasti sa
tyavākya koṅguṇi
varmmadharmmamahā
rājādhirāja nanda
girinātha kuvaḷāla
puravarēśvara śrīrā
camallapermānaḍiga
ḷa mahādēviyarggaṁ
puṭṭidoḷakhiḷabhu
vanataḷaratnabhū
teyarappajāya

bbarasiyarggaṁ pu
ṭṭidaṁ śrīmahēndrā
dhirājaṁ mahēndrā
dhirājarggaṁ gaṅgara ma
gaḷgāmabbemahā
dēvigaṁ puṭṭidona
yyapadēvanayya
padēvaṅgaṅgaṅgara
magaḷpollabbarasi
gaṁ puṭṭidona
ṇniganaṇnigaṅgaṁ ca
ḷukiyara maga
ḷattiyabbarasi
gaṁ puṭṭidoṁ sama
dhigatapañcama
hāśabda pallavā
nvaya śrīpṛthvīva
llabha pallavaku

latilakaṁ śrīma
diṟuḷacōra
nniṣkaṁṭakaṁ
rājyaṁgeyyutti
re śakanṛpakālā
tītasaṁvatsarada śa
taṅgaḷeṇṭunūṟa
yvattondanaya virō
dhisaṁvatsaraṁ prava
rttise tadvariṣābhya
ntarādoḷ māgha
doḻnavami diva
samu vaḍḍavāramu
mūlanakṣatramuṁ si
ddhameṁba yōgamu
māge tagaḍūra pa
ḍuvaṇa dēhāru
māṅgabbekantiyaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 9.23 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
